title: US Navy turns to AI firm Domino for options to counter Iranian mines
description: The U.S. Navy is accelerating its artificial intelligence capabilities to detect Iranian mines in the Strait of Hormuz, a critical shipping lane. A new contract with Domino Data Lab aims to significantly reduce the time it takes to train underwater drones to identify new mine types, potentially cutting a six-month process down to days.
